minecraft:emitter_initialization.creation_expression: v.pjfnmgv = v.pjfnmgv??1.5; v.cgqlezt = (v.cgqlezt??2)+0.01; v.gohtjqv = 3; v.jykpqcg = 16; v.gltxtos=0; v.sztwdej??{v.sztwdej.x = 0; v.sztwdej.y = 0; v.sztwdej.z = 0;}; v.rjocvgo ?? {v.rjocvgo.x = 0; v.rjocvgo.y = 1; v.rjocvgo.z = 0;};

sequence.expression: t.rhxwbig=math.lerp(0.5/32, 2/32, (v.pjfnmgv-0.5)/(12.5-0.5)); t.gfxopjk = math.floor(v.gltxtos/v.jykpqcg); t.ptfylby=360*math.mod(v.gltxtos + (t.gfxopjk>2 ? 0.5 : 0), v.jykpqcg)/v.jykpqcg; t.gfxopjk > 2 ? { t.ogkcjpi=v.cgqlezt*(t.gfxopjk-3)/(v.gohtjqv-1)-v.cgqlezt/2; t.urwmsaq=v.pjfnmgv; t.ehcenlr=t.urwmsaq*math.sqrt(2-2*math.cos(360/v.jykpqcg))/2; t.lonhuhh=math.sqrt(t.urwmsaq*t.urwmsaq-t.ehcenlr*t.ehcenlr); t.cihteif=math.cos(t.ptfylby+90); t.dllqnig=0; t.olvbrrc=math.sin(t.ptfylby+90); } : { t.uxskrtp=t.gfxopjk==1; t.ogkcjpi=v.cgqlezt*(t.gfxopjk-1)/2; t.lonhuhh=v.pjfnmgv * (t.uxskrtp ? 1 : 0.5); t.uxskrtp ? { t.cihteif=0; t.dllqnig=1; t.olvbrrc=0; t.ehcenlr=v.cgqlezt/2; } : { t.cihteif=math.cos(t.ptfylby); t.dllqnig=0; t.olvbrrc=math.sin(t.ptfylby); t.ehcenlr=t.lonhuhh; }; }; v.gltxtos=v.gltxtos+1; t.olobvfp = v.rjocvgo.x; t.zowvgkr = v.rjocvgo.y; t.mibnuum = v.rjocvgo.z; math.abs(t.zowvgkr) > 0.99 ? { t.mryvvgy = t.zowvgkr; t.euzkkwe = -t.olobvfp; t.xlelkll = 0; } : { t.mryvvgy = t.mibnuum; t.euzkkwe = 0; t.xlelkll = -t.olobvfp; }; t.gfqzpqj=math.sqrt(t.mryvvgy*t.mryvvgy+t.euzkkwe*t.euzkkwe+t.xlelkll*t.xlelkll); t.mryvvgy=t.mryvvgy/t.gfqzpqj; t.euzkkwe=t.euzkkwe/t.gfqzpqj; t.xlelkll=t.xlelkll/t.gfqzpqj; t.zajdgui=-t.xlelkll*t.zowvgkr+t.euzkkwe*t.mibnuum; t.jzyjoui=t.xlelkll*t.olobvfp-t.mryvvgy*t.mibnuum; t.ohiaaps=-t.euzkkwe*t.olobvfp+t.mryvvgy*t.zowvgkr; t.gfqzpqj=math.sqrt(t.zajdgui*t.zajdgui+t.jzyjoui*t.jzyjoui+t.ohiaaps*t.ohiaaps); t.zajdgui=t.zajdgui/t.gfqzpqj; t.jzyjoui=t.jzyjoui/t.gfqzpqj; t.ohiaaps=t.ohiaaps/t.gfqzpqj; t.ejxaeqh=t.lonhuhh*math.cos(t.ptfylby); t.njrbypk=t.ogkcjpi; t.zsuccnp=t.lonhuhh*math.sin(t.ptfylby); t.vvcltaz = t.ejxaeqh*t.mryvvgy + t.njrbypk*t.olobvfp + t.zsuccnp*t.zajdgui + v.sztwdej.x; t.ogkcjpi = t.ejxaeqh*t.euzkkwe + t.njrbypk*t.zowvgkr + t.zsuccnp*t.jzyjoui + v.sztwdej.y; t.awaptpw = t.ejxaeqh*t.xlelkll + t.njrbypk*t.mibnuum + t.zsuccnp*t.ohiaaps + v.sztwdej.z; t.mpjsmgm=t.cihteif; t.ykcmnae=t.dllqnig; t.rxbzoww=t.olvbrrc; t.cihteif = t.mpjsmgm*t.mryvvgy + t.ykcmnae*t.olobvfp + t.rxbzoww*t.zajdgui; t.dllqnig = t.mpjsmgm*t.euzkkwe + t.ykcmnae*t.zowvgkr + t.rxbzoww*t.jzyjoui; t.olvbrrc = t.mpjsmgm*t.xlelkll + t.ykcmnae*t.mibnuum + t.rxbzoww*t.ohiaaps;

particle_effect.pre_effect_expression: v.hahlhow = t.vvcltaz; v.pegfumj = t.ogkcjpi; v.rgztdom = t.awaptpw; v.ucbteoy=t.cihteif; v.chcvwqs=t.dllqnig; v.pkzkfjf=t.olvbrrc; v.brtepfb=t.ehcenlr; v.mjxejye=t.rhxwbig; v.vmbtigc = 0.01; v.efccfwg = 2/20;
